mismatches.detail: PART2 states V1 Lead=Sonnet, Sub=Haiku. SOT §9.1 also states Lead=Sonnet(cost savings), Sub=Haiku. However, SOT §11.2.1 cost table shows V1 Lead=Sonnet, V2 Lead=Opus. PART2 §6.7 V2 agent table says Trading Agent LLM=Opus which is a Sub-agent, not Lead. SOT §9.2 says V2 Lead=Opus. Minor inconsistency: PART2 §6.7 V2 table lists Opus only for Trading Agent (a sub), while SOT §9.2 explicitly says V2 Lead=Opus. PART2 implies Lead model stays Sonnet in V2 by not mentioning Lead upgrade.

PART2 cites LOCK-AT-007 source as 'D2.0-05 §7.3'. SOT AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC §10.1 cites it as 'D2.0-05 §7.3 고정2'. Minor: PART2 drops the suffix '고정2' which is a precision detail in the SOT. Technically the reference is the same section, but the SOT is more specific.

match_details.fact: V1 agent count: Lead + max 2 Sub-agents (total 3)
V1 collaboration patterns: Sequential, Parallel only
V1 delegation depth: max 2 (LOCK-AT-004 absolute max=3)
match_details.detail: SOT: '최대 2단계 (Lead → Sub) — config 제한. LOCK-AT-004 절대상한=3단계'. Match.
SOT: 'InMemoryDispatcher'. PART2 says 'In-Memory Queue'. Semantically equivalent.
SOT §10.1 has exactly 17 LOCK-AT entries (001-017). Match.

match_details.fact: LOCK-AT-001: V1 lightweight framework, external via adapter only
match_details.detail: Exact match on content and reference D2.0-05 §5.1

match_details.fact: LOCK-AT-009: Turn limits P0=5, P1=10, P2=20
LOCK-AT-010: TEE max repeats P0=3, P1=5, P2=10
LOCK-AT-015: Lead Agent no direct execution

match_details.detail: Match. MCP Bridge Layer uses Streamable HTTP.

match_details.fact: MCP external server catalog: V1=7, V2+=3, V3=1, total=11
match_details.detail: PART2 counts: mcp.search.tavily, serpapi, mcp.code.e2b, pyodide, mcp.doc.unstructured, pymupdf, mcp.browser.playwright = 7 V1. mcp.vision.clip, mcp.speech.whisper, mcp.db.postgres = 3 V2. mcp.realtime.websocket = 1 V3. Total=11. Consistent.

match_details.fact: V2 collaboration patterns: Sequential, Parallel, Debate, Supervisor, Handoff
V1/V2 communication: V1=InMemoryDispatcher (Lead hub), V2+=Redis MessageBus
LOCK-AT-017: No-code builder = n8n + Flowise dual structure

missing.detail: PART2 §6.7 V2 section only lists Sub-agent types and their models. It does not explicitly state V2 Lead Agent model changes to Opus. SOT §9.2 explicitly says Lead=Opus for V2.

missing.sot_fact: DEFER-AT-001: MessageBus implementation decision (In-Memory vs Redis) deferred to V1.1
missing.detail: PART2 mentions V2-003 Agent Teams vs FREEZE conflict (CLAUDE.md §9) but does not explicitly list DEFER-AT-001 as a deferred decision item in §6.7.

missing.sot_fact: V2 cost per task budget: 2,000 KRW/task
missing.detail: SOT §11.2.1 specifies V1=500/task, V2=2000/task, V3=5000/task. PART2 only mentions daily/monthly cost limits, not per-task budgets.
PART2 §6.7 does not describe agent lifecycle states. This detailed specification from SOT is omitted.

check_details.sot_fact: Lead Agent roles: Planning, Assignment, Monitoring, Merging, Verification, Decision Lock
check_details.detail: PART2 L2648: 'plans, assigns, monitors'. Covers main roles, though abbreviated.

check_details.sot_fact: Sub-Agent types: Research, Coding, Quant, Content, Trading, SDAR, Critic, Productivity
check_details.detail: PART2 §6.7 lists all 8 agent types across V1 and V2 tables. Match.
PART2 L2683: LOCK-AT-012 'Agent 메시지에 HMAC 무결성 서명 필수'. Present.

check_details.sot_fact: MessageType enum: delegation, result, progress, handoff, help_request, abort, context_update
check_details.detail: PART2 does not list MessageType enum values. Only general HMAC requirement is mentioned.

check_details.sot_fact: 5 Gate system (G0~G4) integrated with Agent Teams
check_details.detail: PART2 L2676: LOCK-AT-005 '모든 에이전트 실행은 07 Gate 선행 통과 필수'. Present.

check_details.sot_fact: Delegation Attack defense: chain depth limit, privilege escalation detection, circular reference detection
check_details.detail: PART2 mentions LOCK-AT-004 (depth limit) and LOCK-AT-013 (privilege escalation prevention), but does not detail circular reference detection from SOT §11.1.1.

check_details.sot_fact: Agent isolation: context isolation, file ownership, tool allowlist, network via MCP only, code sandbox
check_details.detail: PART2 does not describe agent isolation policies in detail. Security section §6.5 covers general security but not agent-specific isolation.

check_details.sot_fact: V3 agents: 50+ dynamic spawn/destroy, Multi-Agent Mesh, Federated, A2A Protocol
check_details.detail: PART2 CLAUDE.md §17 mentions V3=50+, A2A, Federated. But PART2 §6.7 itself does not have a V3 section with these details.

check_details.sot_fact: DEFER-AT-003: Agent Marketplace registration criteria undefined (V2)
check_details.detail: PART2 L2664: explicitly notes 'DEFER-AT-003: Agent Marketplace 등록 기준 미정의'. Match.

check_details.sot_fact: Prompt Injection defense: 6 layers (NeMo, Guardrails AI, LlamaGuard, Post-audit, Instruction Hierarchy, Canary Token)
check_details.detail: PART2 §6.5 covers NeMo(L1), Guardrails AI(L2), LlamaGuard(L3) but does not mention Canary Token or Instruction Hierarchy from SOT §11.1.2.

check_details.sot_fact: AgentEvent enum: 17+ lifecycle events (team.*, delegation.*, agent.*, handoff.*, gate.*, cost.*)
check_details.detail: PART2 §6.11 lists 'agent.task.started/completed/failed' (3 events). SOT §2.3.2 defines 17+ agent events. PART2 coverage is very partial.

findings.description: PART2 §6.7 V2 section does not explicitly state V2 Lead Agent model upgrades to Opus. SOT AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC §9.2 and §11.2.1 clearly specify V2 Lead=Opus.
findings.evidence: PART2 V2 table only lists Sub-agent models. SOT §9.2: 'Lead=Opus, Sub=Sonnet/Haiku 차등'. SOT §11.2.1: 'V2 Lead=Opus'.

findings.description: Per-task budget information not included in PART2. SOT §11.2.1 specifies V1=500/task, V2=2000/task, V3=5000/task.
findings.evidence: SOT §11.2.1 cost table includes 'per-task budget' column. PART2 only mentions daily/monthly limits.

findings.description: Agent lifecycle states (created->initialized->active->suspended->terminated->archived) from SOT §2.4.1 not described in PART2 §6.7.
findings.evidence: SOT §2.4 provides detailed lifecycle with LogEvent mappings. PART2 omits this.

findings.description: SOT agent events (AgentEvent enum, 17+ events) poorly covered in PART2. Only 3 agent events listed in §6.11 vs 17+ in SOT §2.3.2.
Agent isolation policies (context, file, tool, network, code sandbox isolation) from SOT §11.1.3 not documented in PART2 §6.7.
findings.evidence: SOT §11.1.3 AgentIsolationPolicy class with 5 isolation dimensions. PART2 has general security in §6.5 but no agent-specific isolation.
